title: Flow Field Generator
shortDescription: Paint flowing generative art driven by a noise field. Tweak particles, palette and flow, then export PNG or SVG.

title: Image Ditherer
shortDescription: Turn any image into dithered pixel art with Floyd–Steinberg and ordered Bayer algorithms, retro palettes and downscaling.

title: SVG Blob Generator
shortDescription: Generate smooth organic blob shapes. Copy the SVG, the path, or a CSS clip-path, or download as a file.

title: Cubic Bezier Editor
shortDescription: Drag an easing curve, preview it live, and copy the cubic-bezier() timing function for your CSS transitions.

title: Regex Tester
shortDescription: Test regular expressions live with match highlighting, capture groups, a replace preview and a token cheatsheet.

title: QR Code Generator
shortDescription: Turn text or a URL into a QR code with custom colors and error correction, then download it as SVG or PNG.

title: Contrast Checker
shortDescription: Check colour contrast against WCAG AA and AAA, preview real text, and get a suggested passing colour.

title: Dice Roller & Initiative
shortDescription: Roll any dice expression with Cyberpunk RED exploding d10s, plus a built-in initiative tracker for the table.

title: Screamsheet Generator
shortDescription: Generate a printable Night City tabloid front page: headlines, rumours and corp ads, reshuffled every roll.

title: Neography
shortDescription: Type a Dutch sentence and transform it into hand-built constructed scripts. Renders live and exports as SVG.

title: DOCX Editor
shortDescription: Upload a Word document, edit it in the browser with full rich text support, and download the result.

title: CV Builder
shortDescription: Build a professional two-column CV with a live preview and print it as a PDF.

title: Markdown Editor
shortDescription: Write and preview Markdown in the portfolio's pop art style. Open, edit, and download .md files.

title: JSON Formatter
shortDescription: Prettify, minify, and explore JSON with a collapsible tree view.

title: Cyberpunk Red Generator
shortDescription: Random encounter, NPC, loot, and location generators for Cyberpunk Red TTRPG sessions.

title: CPR Rules Reference
shortDescription: Searchable wiki of Cyberpunk Red core mechanics. Stats, skills, combat, netrunning, and more.

title: Component Gallery
shortDescription: Interactive gallery of all UI components used in the portfolio. Toggle themes, adjust props, copy JSX.

title: Diff Checker
shortDescription: Compare two texts side-by-side and see differences highlighted line-by-line.

title: CSS Style Explorer
shortDescription: Explore design movements from Pop Art to Cyberpunk. Pick a preset, tweak every property, copy the CSS.

title: Mondriaan Generator
shortDescription: Generate compositions in the style of Piet Mondriaan. Adjust the grid, colors, and export as SVG.

title: Halftone Image Converter
shortDescription: Upload an image and convert it to a halftone dot pattern. Export as SVG or PNG.

title: Op Art Pattern Generator
shortDescription: Generate mesmerizing optical illusion patterns with adjustable parameters.

title: Color Palette from Image
shortDescription: Upload an image and extract its dominant colors. Export as CSS variables or JSON.

title: Geometric Pattern Tiler
shortDescription: Create repeating geometric patterns from shapes. Choose layout, colors, and export.

title: ASCII Art Generator
shortDescription: Convert images to ASCII art. Choose character sets, adjust contrast, and copy or download.

title: CPR Loading Screen
shortDescription: Random Cyberpunk Red loading screen tips. Click or press any key for the next one.

title: Image Tagger
shortDescription: Tag and organize images with custom labels.

title: Sprite Extractor
shortDescription: Select and extract sprites from sprite sheets.

title: TTRPG Map Maker
shortDescription: Grid-based map builder for tabletop RPG sessions.

title: Sprite Sheet Splitter
shortDescription: Split AI-generated sprite sheets into individually named, transparent PNG tiles with auto grid detection.

title: Mesh Gradient Maker
shortDescription: Place color points and create smooth mesh gradients. Export as CSS or PNG.
